entity.summary: British Virgin Islands-registered centralized cryptocurrency exchange founded in 2015 and continuing through its active global trading platform.
entity.notes: Official company material and an independent exchange profile support the 2015 founding year and continuing operation.

expected.summary: British Virgin Islands-based centralized exchange launched in 2015 and still operating under the LBank brand.

changes.summary: British Virgin Islands-registered centralized cryptocurrency exchange founded in 2015 and continuing through its active global trading platform.
changes.notes: Official company material and an independent exchange profile support the 2015 founding year and continuing operation.

events.title: LBank began operating
events.description: LBank began operating as a centralized cryptocurrency exchange in 2015.
events.notes: Year-level launch marker based on official company history.

events.title: Japan's FSA warned LBank over unregistered exchange activity
events.description: Japan's Financial Services Agency issued a warning stating that LBank had provided crypto-asset exchange services to Japanese residents over the internet without registration.
events.notes: The warning concerned Japanese registration requirements and did not establish a global shutdown or change LBank's active entity status.

evidence.title: About LBank
evidence.notes: Official company page identifying 2015 as the exchange's founding year.

evidence.title: LBank official exchange
evidence.notes: Current official exchange interface corroborating continuing operation.

evidence.title: CoinGecko exchange reference for LBank
evidence.notes: Independent exchange profile corroborates the LBank identity, British Virgin Islands registration, and 2015 establishment year.

evidence.title: Warning regarding an operator conducting crypto-asset exchange business without registration (LBank Exchange)
evidence.notes: Primary regulatory notice states that LBank served Japanese residents without crypto-asset exchange registration.

evidence.title: Japanese Regulator Hits Crypto Exchange LBank With Official Warning
evidence.notes: Contemporaneous reporting corroborates the June 14 warning and its unregistered-services basis.
